manifest.goal: Represent decode attention TILE+COMBINE as one searchable lifecycle bundle instead of isolated kernels.
manifest.authority: W==D only after route binding, materialization hygiene, and token correctness pass.

tile_program.role: split-KV tile: qk score, online softmax state, partial PV output, per-split metadata

combine_program.role: global log-sum-exp combine over split partials

promotion_gate: route fires generated bundle instead of owned tile/combine
W==D improves over A2 generated skeleton and approaches owned route within promotion threshold
manifest.notes: A3.4 is a lifecycle representation gate. It does not claim speed until the bundle is actually route-bound.
